hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.py) mkdir -p "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude" && printf '%s\n' "$f" >> "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/.format-dirty" ;; esac; exit 0

M="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/.format-dirty"; [ -s "$M" ] || { rm -f "$M"; exit 0; }; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" || exit 0; sort -u "$M" -o "$M"; awk 'NF' "$M" | while IFS= read -r f; do [ -e "$f" ] && printf '%s\n' "$f"; done > "$M.tmp" && mv "$M.tmp" "$M"; [ -s "$M" ] || { rm -f "$M"; exit 0; }; xargs -a "$M" -d '\n' uv run pyfltr --exit-zero-even-if-formatted --commands=fast >&2; rm -f "$M"; exit 0
